name: Voice Interface
description: Real-time voice dictation and text-to-speech playback, straight from the browser — no external API involved. We use your device's native APIs.
longDescription: Combines SpeechRecognition (voice → text, with live transcription) and SpeechSynthesis (text → voice, with system voice selection) in the same demo — the two halves of a complete voice interface, using only native Web APIs, no external API involved. The recognition language and the default synthesis voice follow the site's active locale (pt-BR, en-US, or es-ES).
tags: Speech Recognition, Text-to-Speech, Speech Synthesis, Accessibility, Voice
architecture: Web Speech API, SpeechRecognition, SpeechSynthesis, Runs entirely on the client, Language synced to the site's active locale
concepts: Real-time transcription, interim/final result deduplication, speech synthesis queue, asynchronous voice loading, voice-based accessibility
srDesc1: The Speech Recognition API is a browser API that converts speech into text.
srDesc2: In practice, it lets web applications listen to the user's microphone and automatically interpret commands or speech.
ttsDesc1: The Text-to-Speech API, on the other hand, does the reverse: it converts text into voice.
ttsDesc2: This lets web applications "speak" information to the user using voices generated by the browser or operating system itself.
combinedNote: Together, these APIs help web applications and PWAs build experiences that are more interactive, more accessible, and closer to native apps.
warningText: Heads up: to use this feature, you need to allow access to your device's microphone. The audio is processed entirely in the browser: nothing is sent, stored, or collected on a server.
howToUseText: Click the button below to capture audio from your microphone — the browser will ask for permission the first time. The transcript appears in real time in the text box below. To hear the transcribed text read back, click "Play"; to stop capturing, click the button again (now "Capturing audio...").
transcriptionPlaceholder: Click the button and speak to transcribe the audio...
unsupportedMessage: The Speech Recognition API isn't supported in this browser or platform.
micErrorMessage: Couldn't access the microphone. Check that permission was granted and try again.
voiceSelectLabel: Select a voice for text-to-speech playback
ttsUnsupportedMessage: Text-to-Speech isn't supported in this browser or platform.
method1: new SpeechRecognition() — creates an instance of the browser's speech recognizer
method2: recognition.start() — starts audio capture and speech recognition
method3: recognition.stop() — ends capture and processes the remaining audio before closing the session
method4: recognition.onresult — event fired on every interim or final transcription result
method5: recognition.onerror — event fired when the browser denies or fails to access the microphone
method6: recognition.onend — event fired when the recognition session ends
method7: speechSynthesis.getVoices() — returns the list of voices available in the browser and operating system
method9: new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text) — creates a speech request with the text to be synthesized
method10: speechSynthesis.speak(utterance) — sends the request to the browser's speech synthesis queue
method11: speechSynthesis.cancel() — stops any ongoing playback before starting a new one
